The '''Forgotten Spires''' were three manufactured spires located in a mountainous region of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="SWG" /> The origins of these monuments were lost to the ages,<ref name="Sony">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Star%20Wars%20Galaxies:%20Bestiary%20-%20Corellia|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Bestiary – Corellia}}</ref> though they bore a striking resemblance to the [[Forgotten Spire]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].<ref name="SWG" />

Packs of vicious [[Corellian slice hound]]s were spotted near the Forgotten Spires after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Sony" />
